name: Candice Pilkinton
narrative: 3rd and 4th Grade Math Teacher at Austin Achieve Public Schools (Jul 2019-present) with prior Lead Teaching Fellow experience there (Jul 2018-Jun 2019). Previously Substitute Teacher at Austin ISD and ESL Teacher at VIPKID. BA in Linguistics from The University of Texas at Austin. Experience includes grade-level chair duties, math assessment/data analysis, family communication, ARD meetings, accommodations, SEL lessons, and classroom systems.
